nasb.text: You were tired out by the length of your road, Yet you did not say, ‘It is hopeless.’ You found renewed strength, Therefore you did not faint.

esv.text: You were wearied with the length of your way, but you did not say, “It is hopeless”; you found new life for your strength, and so you were not faint.

cnv.text: 你因路途遙遠而困乏， 卻不說：“沒有希望了！” 因為你找著了生命的力量， 所以你不覺得疲倦。

ccb.text: 虽然遥远的路途使你们疲倦， 你们却从不放弃。 你们找到了新的力量， 所以没有晕倒。

csbs.text: 你因路途遥远而困乏， 却不说‘没有希望！’ 你找到了新生的力量， 因此不疲软。
